word: H8317 - שָׁרַץ - shârats - shaw-rats' - Breed abundantly

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁרץ

Transliteration: shârats

Phonetic: shaw-rats'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to teem, swarm, multiply
    1. to swarm, teem
      1. to swarm

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2467

Part(s) of speech: Verb
